name: Little Kids Bubbles by Fubbles | Made in The USA | 64oz Non Toxic Bubble Solution | Refill Solution for Bubble Machines and Bubble Toys
bullets: Includes 64 oz of MADE IN THE USA Fubbles Premium Non Toxic Bubble Solution

Premium quality solution for longer lasting bubbles. This is the perfect bulk bubble solution refill. Refills work with bubble machine, bubble blaster, bubble blower, bubble lawn mower and all our disney bubble toys and nickelodeon bubble toys.
Fubbles bubbles are non-toxic, no dyes and are safety tested and compliant with all Federal and State Requirements

Bubble solution makes great party favors, birthday party supplies, wedding bubbles, outdoor activity. Let the bubble popping begin and it is bubble fun for the whole family: toddlers, kids, adults and even the dog will enjoy
description: For fun with Bubbles, it can only be Fubbles! We are proud to present the Fubbles MADE IN THE USA NON TOXIC BUBBLE SOLUTION. Our 64 oz bubble solution refills is non-toxic and has no dyes. It includes our 64 oz of Fubbles Premium Non Toxic Bubble Solution which is the perfect bubble refill. It is ready to use to make giant bubbles: no bubble mixes and water required. Our premium solution not only gives the best quality bubbles but this bulk bubble solution refill works with all bubble machines, bubble guns, bubble blasters, bubble blowers, bubble lawn mowers and all our disney bubble toys and

reviews.name: Luisa.
reviews.title: Nice
reviews.body: Good for machines but not for regular blowing bubbles but still good

reviews.name: charifath
reviews.title: Fun and Easy Bubbles My Son Loves
reviews.body: My son absolutely loves this bubble solution. It makes plenty of bubbles, and they last long enough for him to really enjoy playing outside.The solution works well with bubble wands and is easy to use without any hassle. It’s become a fun activity that keeps him entertained and excited.Overall, a great bubble solution for kids and something we’ll keep buying again.

reviews.name: Rohnda Humphries
reviews.title: Fun time.
reviews.body: This product generated a substantial quantity of bubbles. It is an excellent product.

reviews.name: Cyn
reviews.title: Perfect to refill bubble toys and plentiful.
reviews.body: Bought this to refill a bubble wand purchased at Disneyland and had no issues with the wand. This is a great buy for parents with small children who love to have bubble toys. Great amount of refills from this bottle.
